name: Login and register forms render in English

planSteps.description: Verify the 'Welcome back' login heading is visible
Verify the email and password input fields are visible on the login form
Verify the 'Log in' submit button is visible
Navigate to /login?form=register to open the register form
Verify the 'Join the journey' register heading is visible
Verify the first name, last name, email and password fields are visible on the register form
Verify the 'Create account' submit button is visible
